storyHook: 网上选商品，付款，等货到签收

narrative.when: 晚上十点，躺在床上刷手机
narrative.who: 甲（买家）· 乙（朋友，帮忙看商品）
narrative.how: 滑动屏幕看图片和价格，发消息问对方意见
narrative.method: 浏览选品、比较价格、下单付款、等快递、签收检查
narrative.event: 甲的旧鞋坏了，急着网上买一双新的赶下周的旅行

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My old shoes are broken. The base is coming off.
turns.zh: 我旧鞋坏了，鞋底都裂了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, that is bad. Do you need new shoes for your journey?
turns.zh: 哦，那糟了。你旅行得买双新的吧？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I am looking at some now. What about this grey one?
turns.zh: 对，我正在看。这双灰色的怎么样？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The look is all right. But the notes say it runs small.
turns.zh: 款式还行，但评论说码偏小。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I'll go a size up then. How about this black one?
turns.zh: 明白，那我买大一码。这双黑的呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a bit dear. For that price, you might get a better one.
turns.zh: 有点贵。那个价可以买更好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. I like these white ones. The price is right and the size is good.
turns.zh: 也是。我喜欢这双白的，价格合适，尺码也全。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That one is good. Have you a ticket for less money?
turns.zh: 那双不错。你有省钱券吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I have a ticket for a cheap price.
turns.zh: 好主意。我有一张券，能便宜点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Go for it then. You will have them for the journey.
turns.zh: 太好了，那就买吧。旅行就能穿了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get the white ones. Size 42. Let me put them in the car.
turns.zh: 我就要白的，42码。先加购物车。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See the place name. Is this your house or work?
turns.zh: 地址对一下。你家还是公司？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: At my place. I will be here all day tomorrow. That is good.
turns.zh: 在我家。明天我全天都在，没问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now use that ticket. Every bit helps.
turns.zh: 好，现在用那张券。省一点是一点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. Ten off. I will give the money now.
turns.zh: 好了，减了十块。我现在给钱。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Did it go through?
turns.zh: 付成功了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Payment is done. Order is in.
turns.zh: 成了，钱付了，订单已提交。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What does the clock say for time?
turns.zh: 屏幕显示什么时候到？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says tomorrow afternoon. That is quick.
turns.zh: 显示明天下午，挺快的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. You will have them for the journey.
turns.zh: 那就好，旅行能穿上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep an eye on it.
turns.zh: 我会盯着它。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have another look in the morning. It may be different.
turns.zh: 明早再看一次，可能不一样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will do that. rest up.
turns.zh: 好，那我先睡了。好好休息。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Night. rest up. New shoes tomorrow.
turns.zh: 好好休息，睡个好觉。明天新鞋到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh yes. I am looking forward to it.
turns.zh: 哦，是啊，挺期待的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Morning. Did you see the news?
turns.zh: 早啊，看到物流更新了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not now. Let me have a look.
turns.zh: 还没，我看看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It says on the move. Still on time.
turns.zh: 显示在运输中，还是准时的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I hope it comes before the night meal.
turns.zh: 那就好，希望晚饭前能到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It will. The man said afternoon.
turns.zh: 会的，快递员说下午到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will be here all day. That is good.
turns.zh: 我全天在家，没问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep your box near. They may ring.
turns.zh: 把盒子放身边，他们会打电话。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I have it here now.
turns.zh: 嗯，手机就在手边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Any sign of the car?
turns.zh: 看到货车了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not now. It is only 2.
turns.zh: 还没，不过才两点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see a car outside. Is that your box?
turns.zh: 我看到外面有辆货车，是你的包裹吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me see. Yes, it is the man with the box.
turns.zh: 让我看看。对，是那个带箱子的人。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go get it. I will be here.
turns.zh: 去拿吧，我在这儿等着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Back. The box is light. Good sign.
turns.zh: 回来了，盒子很轻，好兆头。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Open it. I would like to see the new shoes.
turns.zh: 打开看看，我想瞧瞧新鞋。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Let me cut the sticky band.
turns.zh: 好，我来剪胶带。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go soft. Do not cut the box.
turns.zh: 轻点。别把盒子划坏了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No trouble. There we go.
turns.zh: 没事，好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take out the shoe box.
turns.zh: 把鞋盒拿出来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here it is. White box, clean.
turns.zh: 在这儿呢，白盒子，挺干净。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Open it up. Let me see the color.
turns.zh: 打开吧，让我看看颜色。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: White, as I ordered. Looks good.
turns.zh: 白色，跟我订的一样，看着不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have a look at the size. Is it 42?
turns.zh: 看一下尺码，是42吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, 42. Let me put one on.
turns.zh: 对，42。我穿一只试试。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is it like?
turns.zh: 感觉怎么样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is a bit tight on the left foot.
turns.zh: 左脚有点紧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have a go at the other one. They may not be the same.
turns.zh: 试试另一只，有时候两只不一样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right foot is good. It is a good size.
turns.zh: 右脚没问题，大小合适。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Walk a short way. See how it is.
turns.zh: 走一小段路。看看感觉如何。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The base is soft. I like it.
turns.zh: 鞋底软，我喜欢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take a picture for me. I would like to see the color in the light.
turns.zh: 帮我拍张照片，我想看看光线下的颜色。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here you go. The white is bright.
turns.zh: 给你，白色挺亮。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Looks good. Keep them on for a bit.
turns.zh: 看着不错，先穿着吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. No marks on the shoe. Clean.
turns.zh: 好，鞋上没瑕疵，干净。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then you are ready for the journey.
turns.zh: 那你可以准备旅行了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put them in the box again.
turns.zh: 我把它们放回盒子里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Why? You are not sending them back.
turns.zh: 干嘛？你又不退货。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, but I would like to keep the box clean.
turns.zh: 不，但我想保持盒子干净。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Is the paper still inside?
turns.zh: 好吧。里面的纸还在吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is still there. The shoes are safe.
turns.zh: 在，还在。鞋子很安全。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now, what about the old ones?
turns.zh: 好。那旧鞋怎么办？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They are in the waste box. No more use.
turns.zh: 扔垃圾桶了，不能再穿了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. A new start for your feet.
turns.zh: 对，你的脚要重新开始了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I will take them for a long walk tomorrow.
turns.zh: 是的，明天我要穿着走远路。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Make a picture of your feet in them. I would like to see.
turns.zh: 拍张你穿着鞋的照片，我想看看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will send you a picture now.
turns.zh: 我现在就发照片给你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do that. I am waiting.
turns.zh: 发吧，我等着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here it is. What is your idea?
turns.zh: 发过去了。你觉得怎么样？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: They look good on you. Very clean.
turns.zh: 你穿着挺好看的，很干净。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. I am happy with them.
turns.zh: 谢了，我很满意。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What was the last amount you gave?
turns.zh: 最后你付了多少钱？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Two hundred thirty eight, with a note.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good price for a good shoe.
turns.zh: 这鞋质量不错，价格公道。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I will keep them for a long time.
turns.zh: 是啊，这双能穿很久。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now get some sleep. It is late.
turns.zh: 好，早点睡吧，不早了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put them in the box now.
turns.zh: 我现在把鞋放回盒子里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep the note for the order.
turns.zh: 留着订单小票。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will put it in the box too.
turns.zh: 对，我也放盒子里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then you will have no trouble if something goes wrong.
turns.zh: 好，这样万一有问题也不怕。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. But I do not see any trouble.
turns.zh: 也是，不过我觉得不会出岔子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You may not be certain. It is wise to be safe.
turns.zh: 你也许不确定。保险点总没错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will do that.
turns.zh: 好的，我照做。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So, are you ready for the journey?
turns.zh: 那，旅行准备得怎么样了？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Almost. Just need to put my things in the bag now.
turns.zh: 差不多了，就差把东西装进包里了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well then, have a good sleep. rest up.
turns.zh: 那行，睡个好觉。好好休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will see when the car comes now.
turns.zh: 我现在看看快递什么时候到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The guide says it will come tomorrow afternoon.
turns.zh: 软件说明天下午到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. I will be here then.
turns.zh: 那挺好，到时候我在家。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: After you get the shoes, how about a walk?
turns.zh: 等你拿到鞋后，我们出去走走？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I would like to have a go.
turns.zh: 好，我想试试看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will come at three.
turns.zh: 行。我三点过来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. alright then.
turns.zh: 好的。到时候见。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The car is here. I see a box at the door.
turns.zh: 快递到了，门口有个箱子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Quick, get it inside and open it.
turns.zh: 快拿进来拆开看看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The box is not damaged. That is good.
turns.zh: 箱子没坏，不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Cut the band. Let us see the shoes.
turns.zh: 划开带子，看看鞋。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, the box inside is clean and white.
turns.zh: 哦，里面的鞋盒干干净净的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take them out. Are they the right size?
turns.zh: 拿出来，尺码对吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, 42. Let me put them on.
turns.zh: 对，42码。我穿上试试。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Are they all right? Not too tight?
turns.zh: 感觉怎么样？不紧吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: They are soft and a good size. That is all right.
turns.zh: 软硬刚好，很合脚。完美。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. You are ready to go.
turns.zh: 太好了，你准备好出发了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will take a picture for my friend. He will be happy.
turns.zh: 我拍张照给朋友，他肯定高兴。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Send it. Then put the old ones in the waste box.
turns.zh: 发吧。然后把旧鞋扔垃圾桶。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. New shoes for the journey. Good night.
turns.zh: 搞定。旅行有新鞋了。晚安。

storyBlurb: 旧鞋开胶，甲深夜刷手机急购新鞋。下单后日日盼快递，签收时忐忑开箱。
storyScript:
【开场·浏览选品】
旧鞋的鞋底已经开裂，走路时脚底能感到地面的凉意。甲躺在床上，手机屏幕的光映在脸上。他滑动着购物页面，一双双运动鞋在指尖掠过。图片上的鞋子崭新锃亮，价格从低到高排列。他点开一双深灰色的，放大看鞋底的纹路和鞋面的材质。又退出来，对比另一双黑色的。手指在屏幕上划来划去，眉头微微皱起。他截了图，发给朋友乙：这双怎么样？乙秒回：款式可以，但你看评论说鞋码偏小。甲又翻了几页评论，犹豫着。时间一分一秒过去，窗外路灯昏黄，他打了个哈欠，但想到下周的旅行，还是强打精神继续刷。终于，他看中了一双评价不错的白色跑鞋，价格适中，尺码齐全。他点进详情页，仔细看了一遍参数，心里有了决定。

【进行·下单付款】
甲把手机举近了些，确认收货地址无误。他选了42码，白色款，加入购物车。又检查了一遍是否有优惠券可用，发现一张满减券刚好能用。他点了结算，页面跳转到支付界面。手指悬在确认付款的按钮上，犹豫了一秒，然后用力按了下去。支付宝提示支付成功，订单生成。他松了口气，截屏发给乙：下单了，希望后天能到。乙回：等着吧，别急。甲把手机放在枕边，闭上眼睛，脑海里浮现出新鞋的样子。

【进行·等待物流】
第二天早上，甲醒来第一件事就是看物流信息。显示已揽收，正在运输中。他刷新了几次，信息没有更新。上班时，他趁午休又看了一次，显示已到达中转站。他算着时间，如果顺利，明天下午就能到。晚上回家，他再次打开物流页面，发现还在中转站，心里有些焦虑。他给客服发了条消息：请问我的快递什么时候能到？客服回复：预计明天下午送达。他稍微安心了些，但睡前还是忍不住又看了一眼。

【收束·签收验货】
第三天下午，手机响了，快递员说包裹已放在门口。甲快步走过去，抱起纸箱，沉甸甸的。他拆开胶带，打开箱盖，里面是鞋盒。他拿出鞋盒，掀开盖子，新鞋静静地躺在里面，白色鞋面干净如雪。他拿起一只，捏了捏鞋底，软硬适中。又检查了鞋垫和鞋带，没有瑕疵。他穿上新鞋，走了几步，大小刚好，脚感舒适。他拍了一张照片发给乙：到了，完美！乙回：不错，旅行可以穿新鞋了。甲满意地笑了，把旧鞋扔进了垃圾桶。
